arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool in talks to sign De Jong from Barcelona
arts.sum: - Liverpool are the latest club rumored to be making a move for Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, according to El Nacional . - Chelsea are closing in on a deal to sign Sporting CP midfielder Dário Essugo, the Sun on Sunday reports.

arts.ttl: Sevilla set €45m asking price for Juventus target
arts.sum: Sevilla have had a relatively good season up until now, and a big reason for this is the excellent form of Dodi Lukebakio. The Belgian winger had a rather quiet first campaign at the Ramon Sanchez-Pizjuan, but it is in 2024-25 that he is starting to come into his own. Lukebakio has made up for […] The post Sevilla set €45m asking price for Juventus target appeared first on Football España.
Another fixture for FC Barcelona as the league returns with a trip to Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán and a test against Sevilla. Alexia out for three weeks with ankle sprain - FC Barcelona

arts.ttl: Barcelona starlet snubs €70m offers from Manchester United and Aston Villa
arts.sum: Barcelona had a quiet winter transfer window, with no one joining or leaving Hansi Flick’s first team squad during the month of January. However, that was not for the lack of trying, as the club were keen to bring in Marcus Rashford on loan from Manchester United, although a deal proved to be impossible. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Catalan giants 'want record-breaking MLS wonderkid' who could be long-term Robert Lewandowski replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing New York Red Bulls striker Julian Hall, viewing him as a potential long-term replacement for Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's five best January transfers of all time
arts.sum: Davids left the club to join Inter on a free transfer in 2004, but Barcelona won La Liga the following season and Rijkaard’s eventual success at Camp Nou may not have been possible without the legendary midfielder. Jose Manuel Pinto spent 10 years at Celta Vigo before joining Barcelona on loan in January 2008.
